items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian to make your notes interactive with inline input fields, metadata displays, and buttons.
items.title: mProjectsCode/obsidian-meta-bind-plugin: A plugin for Obsidian to make your notes interactive with inline input fields, metadata displays, and buttons.

items.content_html: Obsidian.md plugin which allows you to use your notes to embed, create, and update gists for Github and Opengist. Light & dark theme support, create / update public & private gists either manually or with autosave.
items.title: Aetherinox/obsidian-gistr: Obsidian.md plugin which allows you to use your notes to embed, create, and update gists for Github and Opengist. Light & dark theme support, create / update public & private gists either manually or with autosave.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin, which allows you to measure time.
items.title: Raboro/obsidian-timer-plugin: Obsidian plugin, which allows you to measure time.

items.content_html: Plugin for Obsidian.md. Displays a card view of your notes.
items.title: jillro/obsidian-cards-view-plugin: Plugin for Obsidian.md. Displays a card view of your notes.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that formats and styles your notes with a focus on configurability and extensibility.
items.title: platers/obsidian-linter: An Obsidian plugin that formats and styles your notes with a focus on configurability and extensibility.

items.content_html: (Mostly) reusable code to create messaging threads in Obsidian using the Dataview plugin. I will generalize this further and create sample Obsidian notes and templates later.
items.title: StevenLares/Messaging-Thread-View-for-Dataview-and-Obsidian: (Mostly) reusable code to create messaging threads in Obsidian using the Dataview plugin. I will generalize this further and create sample Obsidian notes and templates later.

items.content_html: Reusable script that maps out the schema for Obsidian subtags. Is primarly for use with the Dataview plugin and promotes a cross-domain approach to notetaking.
items.title: StevenLares/Obsidian-Dataview-Schema: Reusable script that maps out the schema for Obsidian subtags. Is primarly for use with the Dataview plugin and promotes a cross-domain approach to notetaking.

items.content_html: Work with chord sheets (chords over lyrics) in Obsidian: Chord diagrams for guitar, ukulele and mandolin, transpose, autoscroll and more. Works in Live Preview and reading mode.
items.title: olvidalo/obsidian-chord-sheets: Work with chord sheets (chords over lyrics) in Obsidian: Chord diagrams for guitar, ukulele and mandolin, transpose, autoscroll and more. Works in Live Preview and reading mode.
